variants.name: Editorial Luxe
variants.blurb: Magazine-grade serif display, generous whitespace, and a refined premium feel.

variants.name: Modern Clinical
variants.blurb: Crisp, trustworthy, and medical-grade — white space with a confident accent.

variants.name: Organic Warm
variants.blurb: Earthy, botanical, and soft — for businesses that want to feel human and welcoming.

variants.name: Bold Minimal
variants.blurb: Near-monochrome, huge type, and a gallery-like focus on what matters.

variants.name: Dark Aura
variants.blurb: A dark canvas with neon glow and glass — premium, modern, and spa-tech.

variants.name: Gradient Energy
variants.blurb: Vibrant mesh gradients, glassmorphism, and bento-grid energy for modern brands.

variants.name: Retro Warm
variants.blurb: 70s revival with terracotta, mustard, and sage — playful, human, and memorable.

variants.name: Soft Pastel
variants.blurb: Calming pastel gradients, soft cards, and gentle rounded forms for a soothing feel.

variants.name: Swiss Grid
variants.blurb: Strict grid, black/white, and one accent — international typographic style.

variants.name: Refined Brutalist
variants.blurb: Raw borders, high contrast, and offset shadows for a confident, memorable edge.

variants.name: Coastal Light
variants.blurb: Fresh, airy, and professional — sand, blue, and lots of white space.

variants.name: Urban Gold
variants.blurb: Deep navy, gold, and cream — premium, professional, and built for trust.

variants.name: Agentic Conversational
variants.blurb: 2026-ready agentic UX: chat-like actions, quick answers, and a site that acts for the visitor.

variants.name: Local Trust
variants.blurb: Conversion-first local business: phone, proof, and trust signals front and center.

variants.name: Artisan Heritage
variants.blurb: Warm, editorial, and handcrafted — perfect for makers, food, boutiques, and heritage services.

faq.answer: Well Rounded Momma offers comprehensive midwifery and reproductive care, including prenatal, birth, and postpartum services, all focused on supporting expectant mothers and their families.

faq.answer: Yes, Well Rounded Momma provides energy work and sound healing as part of their holistic care approach, designed to support the wellness and relaxation of expectant mothers.
faq.question: Can I receive energy work and sound healing during my pregnancy?

faq.answer: During your free consultation, you can discuss your specific needs and explore the variety of services offered to find the best fit for your pregnancy and wellness journey.

social.caption:
Tips for Newborns with Tongue Ties-
A tongue tie, or ankyloglossia, occurs when the tissue connecting the tongue to the floor of the mouth (the frenulum) is shorter or tighter than usual. This can affect a newborn’s ability to latch, feed, and sometimes even breathe comfortably during feeding.

Feeding Support
Seek a lactation consultant: A certified lactation consultant can assess latch issues and provide personalized guidance for positioning and feeding techniques.
Try different feeding positi

Come join us on Thursday from 6pm -7PM

Sign up on our website www.wellroundedmomma.com

 #newservice #soundhealing #experiencesound #restorebalance #singingbowls #singingbowl #energyhealing #bodymind #soundtherapy #tuningforks #vibration #benefits #balancing

Newborn Care Class
Babies don’t come with instruction manuals…but parents do come with instincts! Reinforce your innate ability to help your newborn baby adjust to life outside the womb. Explore tips and techniques for soothing, swaddling, bathing, diapering, cord care, gas relief and temperature taking. Learn what items are essential to have on hand. Discuss options for sleeping arrangements (bed-sharing, co-sleepers, and cribs). This confidence boosting class offers a supportive and fun atmosp

WRM Collective
A Wellness & Healing Collective
A sanctuary for whole-body, whole-soul restoration through movement, energy, bodywork, and birth.

Services
Movement: Classes and practices designed to restore balance, strength, and flow.
Energy Work: Healing sessions to realign and harmonize the body’s natural energy.
Bodywork: Therapeutic treatments to release tension, support recovery, and nurture well-being.
Birth Services: Compassionate support through childbirth education, doula care, and pos

October is Pregnancy and Infant Loss Awareness Month.

A month that carries so much weight for so many of us.
A month where we honor the babies we never got to hold, the babies we held but couldn’t keep, and the dreams that were shattered too soon.

It’s a month that reminds us that grief has no timeline.
That healing doesn’t mean forgetting.
That even if the world moves on, a parent never does.

To every mom and dad carrying a silent ache
You are not alone.
Your baby’s life, no matter how brief

Why Physical Therapy After Birth Matters

Pelvic Floor Recovery:
Pregnancy and delivery can weaken the pelvic floor muscles, leading to issues like incontinence or pelvic pain. Physical therapy helps strengthen these muscles and restore function.
Core Strengthening:
The abdominal muscles stretch during pregnancy, and sometimes a condition called diastasis recti (separation of abdominal muscles) can occur. Physical therapy provides safe exercises to rebuild core strength and stability.
Pain Relie

Why Join the Monday 6 PM Community Movement Circle with Sherry?
Start the week with intention and renewal by joining the Community Movement Circle every Monday at 6 PM. This adult-only gathering offers a unique blend of yoga and Reiki, guided by Sherry, to help reset both body and spirit.

Benefits of the Community Movement Circle
Holistic Healing: Experience the combined power of yoga and Reiki to release tension, restore balance, and promote deep relaxation.
Supportive Community: Connect with

Why Join the Well Rounded Childbirth Class?
Choosing the right childbirth class can make all the difference in your birth experience. Well Rounded Childbirth offers a unique, two-week course designed for families who want to approach birth with confidence, knowledge, and as little intervention as possible. This class stands out because it combines the latest evidence-based information with engaging activities and practical advice tailored to the realities of giving birth in the Vegas valley.

Un

Friendly reminder come join our Dad's support group tonight!

Becoming a father is a life-changing experience, and new dads deserve support just like new moms do. The Postpartum Dads Support Group is a safe space where fathers can connect, share experiences, and learn essential skills for navigating this transformative time.

Group Benefits
Receive emotional support from other fathers facing similar challenges
Learn how to better support a partner during postpartum recovery
Improve communication

In observance of Labor Day, we will be closed on Monday, September 1st. We’ll resume normal business hours on Tuesday. Have a safe and happy holiday!

 #happyholiday #labor #laborday #september1st #wellroundedmommacollective

testimonials.text: I was a client/patient 11 yrs ago. I was lucky to have Sherry Hopkins as my midwife. But the entire team is welcoming and supportive. I Had a healthy baby boy at home with all the loving and attentive care I received from this group of ladies. They helped with lactation as well. It was my first birth and glad I decided to have a home birth. It’s great to see they’re still servicing las Vegas. I would definitely hire WRM for baby #2 . But no plans to extend my family yet :)
testimonials.author: Ana H.

testimonials.text: I just had a [prenatal massage with James](https://pussynaturalenergy.eu/nevada/las-vegas/luxe-thai-spa-massage "LUXE Thai Spa & Massage - Las Vegas, Nevada") and it was wonderful! He was professional, caring, and really helped ease my third trimester aches and pains. I left feeling so much more comfortable and relaxed. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Samantha C.

testimonials.text: Sherry and Erica are truly pillars of the Vegas birth community. Their passion for maternal health and their love for women radiate in everything they do. I had the privilege of being Erica’s student and also joining Sherry’s midwifery circle for student midwives. I’ve learned so much from both of them—wisdom that has shaped my birth work journey and my personal motherhood story. During my first viable pregnancy after multiple miscarriages, I received prenatal care from Erica. She made me feel seen, valued, and never like just another patient or number. When I was diagnosed with severe hyperemesis gravidarum (HG), Erica immediately referred me to Dr. Wilkes at Maternal Fetal [Medicine](https://pussynaturalenergy.eu/nevada/las-vegas/spirit-medicine-massage-healing-arts "Spirit Medicine Massage & Healing Arts - Las Vegas, Nevada"), ensuring I got the care I needed quickly. Truly, our daughter wouldn’t be here without Erica and Dr. Wilkes. Before moving to Colorado, I was navigating postpartum depression, another miscarriage, and irregular cycles. Sherry was the one who took the time to really listen—without rushing, without judgment. She ordered labs, got me started on chaste berry supplements, and helped balance my hormones when I felt like I was drowning. Her care made a tangible difference in my health and well-being. Birth work is a sacred calling, not for the faint of heart—and both of these women embody it with a powerful blend of empathy, experience, and truth-telling. I’ve always appreciated their honesty—no sugarcoating, just real talk from real midwives who care deeply. One of the things I respect most is that neither Sherry nor Erica are “home birth or bust.” They prioritize both baby and mother, and they’re quick to make wise, compassionate decisions—like hospital transfers—when things get serious. They explain everything with love and clarity, never fear or pressure. My only regret is having to move for my husband’s job and not being able to finish my education under their guidance. If you’re seeking prenatal care, home birth support, or even need help with hormones or a pap smear, I highly recommend Well Rounded Mama. Erica now offers concierge care, so you can receive exceptional support without needing to go into the office—ideal for busy or overwhelmed mamas. Sherry and Erica were put on this earth to hold space, support women, and leave the birth world better than they found it—for this generation and the next.
testimonials.author: Caroline H.

testimonials.text: Sherry Hopkins and Jazmyne Turner were my midwives and they were phenomenal. Sherry has delivered 2 of my babies. One labor was short and one was long. I always felt heard and comfortable with these ladies. They helped me so much to relax and trust my body. Jazmyne gave me comfort measures during my last labor that was very difficult and I could not have survived without her!
testimonials.author: David D.

testimonials.text: Cora was my midwife and was a GODSEND. She was so patient and knowledgeable. My water ended up breaking days before baby was born & she guided me through the process of taking herbs to kickstart labor. She delivered my beautiful baby girl at my homebirth. She even did postpartum visits and made sure my postpartum journey & breastfeeding was going well. She is the sweetest human being & even more amazing midwife. I couldn't recommend her more.
testimonials.author: Lindsey A.

testimonials.text: I had Jazmyne as my doula back in October 2023. She was such a great help during my birth. This was my first baby and I had made my mind with doing an all natural water birth. I called Jazmyne when my contractions were getting very strong at 3am and she stayed with me until I had my baby girl 6 hours later. She let me be intuitive with my body & baby and helped me when I needed her. My partner and I were very grateful for her being there with us, it made our experience during labor more memorable. You really meet the most memorable women here at WRM. Love ya Jaz ❤️
testimonials.author: Rebecca J.

blogPosts.html:
Well Rounded Momma
Article

Discover Holistic Reproductive Care with Midwives in Las Vegas

Published by Well Rounded Momma

Experience Holistic Reproductive Care in Las Vegas

Expectant mothers in Las Vegas can find a nurturing and comprehensive approach to reproductive care at Well Rounded Momma. Our skilled midwives offer personalized support that goes beyond traditional methods, ensuring a comfortable and empowering journey into motherhood.

The Role of Midwives in Reproductive Care

Midwives are essential in providing personalized care tailored to the unique needs of each mother. At Well Rounded Momma, our midwives bring years of experience and a compassionate approach to every stage of pregnancy and childbirth. They focus on empowering families with knowledge and support, ensuring a healthy and satisfying birthing experience.

Integrating Energy Work and Sound Healing

At Well Rounded Momma, we believe in holistic care that nurtures both body and mind. Our services include energy work and sound healing, which are designed to enhance relaxation and promote overall well-being. These practices help to balance the body’s energy, reduce stress, and create a calm environment for both mother and baby.

Why Choose Well Rounded Momma?

  • Comprehensive Care: Our holistic approach addresses physical, emotional, and spiritual needs.
  • Experienced Team: Benefit from the expertise of certified midwives and holistic practitioners.
  • Community Support: Join a community of families receiving compassionate care in Las Vegas.

Choosing Well Rounded Momma means choosing a path of empowerment and holistic wellness. Our focus is on providing the best possible experience for expectant mothers and their families.

Ready to embark on your journey with us? Book a consultation today and discover how our holistic reproductive care can support you through pregnancy and beyond.

Ready to take the next step?

Book a free consultation with Well Rounded Momma today.

Book Free Consultation

testimonials.text: I was a client/patient 11 yrs ago. I was lucky to have Sherry Hopkins as my midwife. But the entire team is welcoming and supportive. I Had a healthy baby boy at home with all the loving and attentive care I received from this group of ladies. They helped with lactation as well. It was my first birth and glad I decided to have a home birth. It’s great to see they’re still servicing las Vegas. I would definitely hire WRM for baby #2 . But no plans to extend my family yet :)
testimonials.author: Ana H.

testimonials.text: I just had a [prenatal massage with James](https://pussynaturalenergy.eu/nevada/las-vegas/luxe-thai-spa-massage "LUXE Thai Spa & Massage - Las Vegas, Nevada") and it was wonderful! He was professional, caring, and really helped ease my third trimester aches and pains. I left feeling so much more comfortable and relaxed. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Samantha C.

testimonials.text: Sherry and Erica are truly pillars of the Vegas birth community. Their passion for maternal health and their love for women radiate in everything they do. I had the privilege of being Erica’s student and also joining Sherry’s midwifery circle for student midwives. I’ve learned so much from both of them—wisdom that has shaped my birth work journey and my personal motherhood story. During my first viable pregnancy after multiple miscarriages, I received prenatal care from Erica. She made me feel seen, valued, and never like just another patient or number. When I was diagnosed with severe hyperemesis gravidarum (HG), Erica immediately referred me to Dr. Wilkes at Maternal Fetal [Medicine](https://pussynaturalenergy.eu/nevada/las-vegas/spirit-medicine-massage-healing-arts "Spirit Medicine Massage & Healing Arts - Las Vegas, Nevada"), ensuring I got the care I needed quickly. Truly, our daughter wouldn’t be here without Erica and Dr. Wilkes. Before moving to Colorado, I was navigating postpartum depression, another miscarriage, and irregular cycles. Sherry was the one who took the time to really listen—without rushing, without judgment. She ordered labs, got me started on chaste berry supplements, and helped balance my hormones when I felt like I was drowning. Her care made a tangible difference in my health and well-being. Birth work is a sacred calling, not for the faint of heart—and both of these women embody it with a powerful blend of empathy, experience, and truth-telling. I’ve always appreciated their honesty—no sugarcoating, just real talk from real midwives who care deeply. One of the things I respect most is that neither Sherry nor Erica are “home birth or bust.” They prioritize both baby and mother, and they’re quick to make wise, compassionate decisions—like hospital transfers—when things get serious. They explain everything with love and clarity, never fear or pressure. My only regret is having to move for my husband’s job and not being able to finish my education under their guidance. If you’re seeking prenatal care, home birth support, or even need help with hormones or a pap smear, I highly recommend Well Rounded Mama. Erica now offers concierge care, so you can receive exceptional support without needing to go into the office—ideal for busy or overwhelmed mamas. Sherry and Erica were put on this earth to hold space, support women, and leave the birth world better than they found it—for this generation and the next.
testimonials.author: Caroline H.

testimonials.text: Sherry Hopkins and Jazmyne Turner were my midwives and they were phenomenal. Sherry has delivered 2 of my babies. One labor was short and one was long. I always felt heard and comfortable with these ladies. They helped me so much to relax and trust my body. Jazmyne gave me comfort measures during my last labor that was very difficult and I could not have survived without her!
testimonials.author: David D.

testimonials.text: Cora was my midwife and was a GODSEND. She was so patient and knowledgeable. My water ended up breaking days before baby was born & she guided me through the process of taking herbs to kickstart labor. She delivered my beautiful baby girl at my homebirth. She even did postpartum visits and made sure my postpartum journey & breastfeeding was going well. She is the sweetest human being & even more amazing midwife. I couldn't recommend her more.
testimonials.author: Lindsey A.
